---
title: "Data_statistical analysis"
author: "Jingxin Yuan"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
output:
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex
    fig_crop: false
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 1
    number_sections: true
urlcolor: blue
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

```

# Introduction
